# BP-136 positive variant: schema migration runs in a Gin request handler.
lang: go
file: BP-136-variant-vulnerable.go
variant: gorm-gin
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

type User struct{}

func createUser(db *gorm.DB, c *gin.Context) {
	_ = db.AutoMigrate(&User{})
}
